name: Chewy Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the shortening, margarine, and peanut butter. Add the eggs and beat until well combined.
2. In another bowl, mix the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, soda, and salt.
3. Gradually add the dry mixture to the moist mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Form golf ball-sized balls of dough with your hands.
5. Press a fork crosswise on top of each cookie to flatten slightly.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes, or until golden brown and crispier for longer baking times.
7. Makes approximately 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
